nl_query: Which scripts have scan metadata indicating a quality score below 0.5, have been rescanned at least once, and are currently assigned to an evaluator but not yet frozen?
failed_sql: SELECT a.id AS script_id, a.urn, sa.evaluator_id, sa.assigned_at, sa.attempt_type, ea.status FROM answer_script a JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id WHERE a.scan_metadata->>'quality_score'::NUMERIC < 0.5 AND sa.replaced_previous = TRUE AND ea.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND a.lifecycle_status = 'ATTEMPTED' AND a.block_status = 'NONE'
error: Validation failed (schema): Type mismatch: answer_script.scan_status (VARCHAR): boolean literal used on string column. Tip — integer/bigint columns need unquoted numeric literals (e.g. board_id = 5, not board_id = '5'). If you are filtering by a human-readable label like a course code or name, use the .code or .name VARCHAR column instead of the numeric .id column.
